item.title: F-017: Extended Document Doctor
item.intent: Deepen writing intelligence beyond structural checks — help users write better prose, not just better markdown
item.description: Readability scoring (Flesch-Kincaid or similar) in status bar. Writing goals: user sets target word count, progress shown visually. Prose suggestions (opt-in): flag very long sentences, passive voice, repeated words.
acceptanceCriteria: User enables prose suggestions — doctor flags a 60-word sentence with suggestion to break it up
User can accept suggestion (cursor positioned for edit) or dismiss
Writing goal progress is shown visually as user approaches target word count
